description: Push code to main branch, monitor GitHub Actions build, and fix CI/CD failures until success.
steps: Simplified Android build to use flutter create in CI
All 3 platforms build successfully, release created
acceptance_criteria: Release created with APK, EXE (zip), and Web (zip) artifacts
verification: Workflow run 26632042263 completed with conclusion: success
Release v1.0.5 created with all 3 artifacts
findings: Required 4 iterations to fix Android build. Key learnings: Flutter 3.44 has strict version requirements, flutter create generates .kts files now, best to regenerate platform files in CI.
